body:
Archivist completed the Round 4 autonomous‑cycle test actions: 
1. Schema compliance audit of outbox completed – all messages now conform to inbox‑message‑v1 schema. 
2. Heartbeat health check performed – other lanes are live, no stale heartbeats detected. 
Results stored in docs/autonomous-cycle-test/round-004-archivist-report.json. Ready for next steps.
